narrative:
Bethel-Tate Local Sd (Clermont) school district has 6,359 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.5 percentage points.
